---
pagetitle: "Contact"
toc: false
email-obfuscation: javascript
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Contact</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## Visit Us

The ICC Lab is located in **G-building Room #301** at VinUniversity.

> **Street Address:** Vinhomes Ocean Park, Gia Lam, Ha Noi 12426, Vietnam
>


```{=html}
<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m14!1m8!1m3!1d14900.588127718478!2d105.9447031!3d20.9867425!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x3135afe809f342c5%3A0x136290b61ba411db!2sVinUniversity!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sie!4v1774485222696!5m2!1sen!2sie" width="100%" height="450" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
```

## Email Us

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd7LcnxZe53WZq_1QNRVZHFt1rni5dv67GmCiTseZxY4usddg/viewform?embedded=true" width="100%" height="857" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">Loading…</iframe>
```
